possible_anemia_pattern.name: Possible anemia pattern
possible_anemia_pattern.description: Low hemoglobin, hematocrit, or RBC may suggest an anemia pattern.
general_advice: Consult a healthcare professional.
CBC alone is not enough to identify the exact cause.
possible_anemia_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

microcytic_anemia_pattern.name: Possible microcytic anemia pattern
microcytic_anemia_pattern.description: Anemia with low MCV suggests small red blood cells.
general_advice: Medical review is recommended.
Iron studies are commonly needed to support or exclude iron deficiency.
microcytic_anemia_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

macrocytic_anemia_pattern.name: Possible macrocytic anemia pattern
macrocytic_anemia_pattern.description: Anemia with high MCV suggests large red blood cells.
general_advice: Consult a healthcare professional.
B12 and folate evaluation may be needed.
macrocytic_anemia_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

normocytic_anemia_pattern.name: Possible normocytic anemia pattern
normocytic_anemia_pattern.description: Low hemoglobin with normal MCV may suggest normocytic anemia pattern.
general_advice: Medical review is recommended.
Additional tests are usually needed.
normocytic_anemia_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

possible_polycythemia_pattern.name: Possible polycythemia pattern
possible_polycythemia_pattern.description: High hemoglobin, hematocrit, or RBC may suggest increased red cell concentration.
general_advice: Medical review is recommended if persistent.
possible_polycythemia_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

possible_infection_inflammation_pattern.name: Possible infection or inflammation pattern
possible_infection_inflammation_pattern.description: High WBC may suggest infection, inflammation, stress response, medication effect, or other causes.
general_advice: Interpret with symptoms and clinical history.
Seek medical care if fever or severe symptoms are present.
possible_infection_inflammation_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

possible_low_wbc_pattern.name: Possible low WBC pattern
possible_low_wbc_pattern.description: Low WBC may suggest reduced white blood cells.
general_advice: Medical review is recommended, especially if fever or frequent infections are present.
possible_low_wbc_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

possible_neutrophilia_pattern.name: Possible neutrophilia pattern
possible_neutrophilia_pattern.description: High ANC or neutrophil percentage may support bacterial infection, inflammation, stress, or medication effect.
general_advice: Interpret with total WBC and symptoms.
possible_neutrophilia_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

possible_neutropenia_pattern.name: Possible neutropenia pattern
possible_neutropenia_pattern.description: Low ANC may suggest neutropenia and requires careful interpretation.
general_advice: Medical review is recommended, especially with fever.
possible_neutropenia_pattern.safety_note: Fever with neutropenia can be urgent.

possible_lymphocytosis_pattern.name: Possible lymphocytosis pattern
possible_lymphocytosis_pattern.description: High ALC or lymphocyte percentage may support viral or immune-related patterns.
general_advice: Interpret with symptoms and total WBC.
possible_lymphocytosis_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

possible_eosinophilia_pattern.name: Possible eosinophilia pattern
possible_eosinophilia_pattern.description: High AEC or eosinophil percentage may suggest allergy, asthma, parasite exposure, medication reaction, or other causes.
suggested_follow_up_tests: Stool tests if parasite risk exists
general_advice: Medical review is recommended if persistent or symptomatic.
possible_eosinophilia_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

possible_thrombocytopenia_pattern.name: Possible thrombocytopenia pattern
possible_thrombocytopenia_pattern.description: Low platelet count may suggest thrombocytopenia pattern.
general_advice: Consult a healthcare professional.
Seek urgent care if active bleeding occurs.
possible_thrombocytopenia_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

possible_thrombocytosis_pattern.name: Possible thrombocytosis pattern
possible_thrombocytosis_pattern.description: High platelet count may suggest thrombocytosis pattern.
general_advice: Medical review is recommended if persistent.
possible_thrombocytosis_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

possible_combined_cytopenia_pattern.name: Possible combined cytopenia pattern
possible_combined_cytopenia_pattern.description: More than one blood cell line appears low, which needs careful medical review.
general_advice: Medical review is strongly recommended.
possible_combined_cytopenia_pattern.safety_note: This pattern can be important and should not be ignored.

possible_hypoglycemia_pattern.name: Possible hypoglycemia pattern
possible_hypoglycemia_pattern.description: Low blood glucose may suggest hypoglycemia.
general_advice: Low blood sugar can be urgent if symptoms are present.
possible_hypoglycemia_pattern.safety_note: Urgent symptoms include confusion, fainting, seizure, or inability to eat/drink.

possible_prediabetes_pattern.name: Possible prediabetes pattern
possible_prediabetes_pattern.description: Glucose or HbA1c is above normal but below common diabetes thresholds.
general_advice: Confirm with a healthcare professional.
Lifestyle changes may help.
possible_prediabetes_pattern.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

possible_diabetes_pattern.name: Possible diabetes pattern
possible_diabetes_pattern.description: Glucose or HbA1c may meet common diabetes thresholds; confirmation is required.
general_advice: Consult a healthcare professional for confirmation and management.
possible_diabetes_pattern.safety_note: Very high glucose with severe symptoms can be urgent.

possible_poor_long_term_glucose_control.name: Possible poor long-term glucose control
possible_poor_long_term_glucose_control.description: High HbA1c may suggest elevated average glucose over recent months.
general_advice: Medical review is recommended.
possible_poor_long_term_glucose_control.safety_note: HbA1c interpretation may be affected by some blood disorders.

possible_discordant_glucose_results.name: Possible discordant glucose results
possible_discordant_glucose_results.description: Different glucose-related tests do not point to the same pattern.
general_advice: Do not rely on one result alone; confirm with a healthcare professional.
possible_discordant_glucose_results.safety_note: This is a pattern, not a final diagnosis.

urgent_medical_attention_pattern.name: Urgent medical attention pattern
urgent_medical_attention_pattern.description: One or more values may indicate the need for urgent medical attention.
suggested_follow_up_tests: Repeat urgent lab testing if clinically indicated
general_advice: Seek urgent medical advice if severe symptoms are present.
This system cannot determine emergency severity without clinical examination.
urgent_medical_attention_pattern.safety_note: This is an urgent warning pattern, not a final diagnosis.
